title: ononis natrix subvar. arenaria
intro: Ononis natrix subvar. arenaria, also known as the Burnet saxifrage or Burnet, is a perennial herb in the Legume family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the digestion and relieve symptoms of digestive issues. The health benefits of Ononis natrix subvar. arenaria include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion, tincture, or tea, and is often used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
